PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-17-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Corazon Taguiran in Propria Persona.

Ms. Taguiran stated that she was the stepniece of the Decedent through marriage, that her Mother was Zenaida's stepsister, that she has no experience with probate and that she is just trying to carry out Ms. Tomas' wishes. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. The Court encouraged Ms. Taguiran get help from a Probate Attorney if she runs into problems.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
